title: 谋杀启事
summary:
Ridesdale provides Miss Marple with a transcript of Inspector Corradino's interviews with witnesses from the Chipping Clegg Horn case. Upon reviewing the report, Miss Marple observes that the witnesses' accounts are obscured by trivial details. She points out that because the hallway and stairs were dark, witnesses would have seen only the beam of a flashlight held by a masked man rather than the man himself. 

Based on this, Miss Marple theorizes that Rudi Scherz was a "scapegoat" hired to perform a prank. She suggests Scherz was paid to place a newspaper advertisement to investigate the mansion, arrive wearing a mask and cloak, and wave a flashlight while shouting "Hands up!" Miss Marple proposes that Scherz did not actually possess a revolver; instead, she suggests that after he shouted, a mysterious person approached him in the dark, placed a gun over his shoulder, and fired two shots before throwing the weapon next to Scherz to frame him. She asserts the motive was to kill Miss Blacklock and suggests that Mona Harris might possess information regarding the orchestrator of the plan.

Colonel Draco interviews Mona Harris to investigate these theories. Mona explains to Corradino that she and Scherz had planned to go to the movies, but Scherz canceled to pull a "prank" involving a staged robbery. She admits she had seen the advertisement he placed in the newspaper and initially thought it was a joke. However, she denies knowing he possessed a revolver and expresses fear that her knowledge of his plans will make her appear to be a premeditated accomplice.
